most_negative.title:
$NVDA !!!http://Investing.com -- Taiwan prosecutors on Monday indicted a former TSMC employee on charges of stealing trade secrets involving technologies designated by Taiwan as national core technologies for use in China.

TSMC is the world's largest contract chipmaker.

This is the first lawsuit in Taiwan involving the alleged leakage of national core technology trade secrets to China, according to the prosecution.

The prosecution is seeking a seven-year prison sentence.
